## [03:05 - 06:07]

Maybe they're getting an email once a week over here or every other week or two times a week But once you get them into a launch you're probably going to be emailing them a lot more You'll be emailing for each piece of pre-launch content You'll probably be mailing them in between each piece of pre-launch content Once you open cart here and you have your cart open that five to seven days You're gonna be emailing them probably two times on that first day and they're gonna be mailing each day and then in the closing day You're probably gonna be on two or even three times So if you add up all the email you're going to send them during the launch you're probably going to send them In the order of at least 10 12 maybe 15 emails Now a lot of people are like well won't that you know make them mad at me Won't they unsubscribe from you and the answer is no they won't if they're interested in getting the material and the way that you know That they're interested is because they went through this process of joining your new launch list now a lot of times people think Yeah, they think I'm just gonna make them mad They're gonna hate me because I'm sending so much email the reality is like I showed you in that last video They actually love you when you take them through this process and do this Sideway sales letter and deliver some real value in these Pre in the pre-launch content, especially if they're great videos and great training Maybe have some downloads or something they come out the end whether they buy from you or not They love you and that's why we see that great launch list phenomenon. ## [06:07 - 08:07]

You know ten or twenty percent of your list going joining your launch list you're doing pretty good and These people are gonna be pure gold because they are very much interested in this and the tests I've shown Just getting people to go through this process These people these people are more responsive just having gone through this squeeze page Process then they would have been if those same two thousand people were over on this list So it rejuvenates them it brings them it brings it's that recency again by going through this Process of raising their hand and saying yes They've gone through that recency process and now they're that much warmer and you know frankly I see some some serious Crazy numbers that these people are worth once they go through that process now Is it possible to do a launch just to not to bother with this and just to start sending out your pre-launch content over here?
